/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/llama-batched-bench.dir/main.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-batched-bench  -Wl,-rpath,/home/iptv-infra/workspace/llamacpp-aos-benchmark/build-host/bin: ../../bin/libllama-batched-bench-impl.so ../../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9793 ../../common/libllama-common-base.a ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9793 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.15.2 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.15.2 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.15.2
